violations.text: The walk-in cooler was observed holding an ambient temperature of 49 DF and in poor repair. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in unit until unit is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Equipment must be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025

The walk-in cooler was observed held at 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. The only TCS foods in unit were eggs. Eggs were moved to a working unit at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in unit until unit is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2025
